mapper.select: select * from course_reminder where user_id = #{userId} and course_id = #{courseId}
select * from course_reminder where remind_time <= now() and send_count < 3
mapper.insert: insert into course_reminder(user_id, course_id, remind_time, repeat_type) values(#{userId}, #{courseId}, #{remindTime}, #{repeatType})
mapper.update: update course_reminder set send_count = send_count +1, last_send_time = now() where reminder_id = #{reminderId}
mapper.delete: delete from course_reminder where user_id = #{userId} and course_id = #{courseId}
